run.purpose: Start the example GraphQL HTTP server backed by the generated TypeRegistry and demo container.
recommended_when: You need to inspect end-to-end HTTP execution behavior.
You want to reproduce the example/TEST.md curl requests.
avoid_when: Generated example artifacts are stale after an SDL or generator change.
run.expected_outcome: A local HTTP server handles GraphQL POST requests using the generated example runtime.

test.purpose: Run the repository PHPUnit suite configured by phpunit.xml.dist.
recommended_when: Matching the main CI test command.
test.expected_outcome: PHPUnit runs builder, generator, and utils suites with tests/bootstrap.php as bootstrap.

codegen.purpose: Regenerate example models, resolvers, directive artifacts, scalar resolver, and TypeRegistry from SDL with federation support.
recommended_when: Builder or generator changes need to be reflected in generated demo artifacts.
avoid_when: You only need a single targeted artifact regenerated.
codegen.expected_outcome: example/GraphQL generated files are updated to match current SDL and generator behavior.

codegen.purpose: Generate a directive resolver and any directive args class for the selected directive.
recommended_when: Only directive resolver output needs regeneration.
avoid_when: A broad SDL change affects multiple artifact families.
codegen.expected_outcome: Directive-related files under example/GraphQL are refreshed for the selected directive.

codegen.purpose: Generate a field resolver and args class for a selected GraphQL field.
recommended_when: Only one field resolver needs regeneration or inspection.
avoid_when: The change spans many types or directives.
codegen.expected_outcome: Field resolver artifacts for the selected field are written under example/GraphQL.

codegen.purpose: Generate a custom scalar resolver file for the selected scalar type.
avoid_when: SDL changes also require new models or TypeRegistry output.
codegen.expected_outcome: The selected custom scalar resolver file exists in example/GraphQL/Scalar.

codegen.purpose: Generate all type models and related model artifacts from schema SDL.
recommended_when: You want model regeneration without TypeRegistry regeneration.
avoid_when: Resolver wiring or directives also changed.
codegen.expected_outcome: Model-related generated files under example/GraphQL are refreshed.

codegen.purpose: Generate the PSR-container-backed TypeRegistry for the example schema.
recommended_when: You need to inspect generated resolver closures.
avoid_when: Models or resolver artifacts also need regeneration.
codegen.expected_outcome: example/GraphQL/TypeRegistry.php is regenerated from the current schema and builder defaults.

utility_scripts.purpose: Install Composer dependencies before running validation or demo commands.
avoid_when: You intentionally do not want to modify vendor/.
utility_scripts.expected_outcome: Dependencies are installed from composer.json and lock resolution.

utility_scripts.purpose: Exercise compatibility with nikic/php-parser v4 in CI.
recommended_when: Reproducing the dedicated parser-v4 CI job locally.
avoid_when: You do not want to mutate Composer dependency state.
utility_scripts.expected_outcome: Composer dependency state is changed to php-parser v4 compatibility before rerunning tests.

utility_scripts.purpose: Validate Composer manifest correctness in the same way CI does.
utility_scripts.expected_outcome: Composer reports whether composer.json is valid under strict checks.
